greeting.line: Oh — you again. Sorry. Long shift. It's always a long shift.
greeting.line_friendly: Sit. I'll remake it. No questions asked.
greeting.line_hostile: We're done for the night. Door's that way.

lore.line: You ever feel like the routine is... running you? Same cups, same faces. Something's wrong with it lately. Don't tell my manager I said that.
